topic_title: Tamil Nadu government formation proceeds with support for Vijay's TVK party
topic_summary: Political shifts in Tamil Nadu see the Left and VCK parties extending support to Vijay's TVK for government formation. The development has caused friction within the Congress party and its existing alliance with the DMK.

findings.title: India news: Tamil Nadu government takes shape after impasse
findings.summary: Actor-politician Joseph Vijay's TVK party appears poised to form the next Tamil Nadu government after garnering support from other parties, ending days of political uncertainty. DW has the latest.
